title: El Constructor de Puentes
description: Elige el conector correcto para unir las dos oraciones.

questions.question: I wanted to go out, ___ it was raining.
questions.explanation: "But" expresa contraste entre querer salir y la lluvia.

questions.question: She studied hard. ___, she passed the exam.
I stayed home ___ I was feeling sick.
questions.explanation: "Because" indica la causa de quedarse en casa.

questions.question: ___ it was expensive, she bought the dress.
questions.explanation: "Although" expresa contraste: a pesar de ser caro, lo compró.

questions.question: ___, preheat the oven to 180°C.
questions.explanation: "First" indica el primer paso en una secuencia.

questions.question: The movie was long. ___, it was very entertaining.
questions.explanation: "However" expresa contraste formal entre largo y entretenido.

questions.question: I love chocolate, ___ I try not to eat it every day.
questions.explanation: "But" contrasta el amor por el chocolate con la restricción.

questions.question: It was raining, ___ I took an umbrella.
She speaks English. She ___ speaks French and German.
___ mixing all the ingredients, bake for 30 minutes.

sentences.prompt: Connect: 'I like coffee' + 'I don't drink it often'
sentences.correct: I like coffee, however, I don't drink it often

sentences.prompt: Express cause: why you stayed home
sentences.correct: I stayed home because I was sick

sentences.prompt: Give a sequence: first step of a recipe
Express result: it was cold → wore a jacket
sentences.correct: It was cold, so I wore a jacket
Although she was tired, she kept working

title: Conector → Función
description: Empareja cada conector con su función comunicativa.

title: Flashcards de Conectores
description: Aprende cada conector con su categoría, uso y ejemplo.

cards.back: Sin embargo / No obstante — Conecta ideas contrastantes. Más formal que "but".
cards.example: The movie was long. However, it was very entertaining.

cards.back: Por lo tanto — Indica una conclusión o resultado lógico.
cards.example: She studied hard. Therefore, she passed the exam.

cards.back: Además — Añade información con énfasis. Formal.
cards.example: The hotel is beautiful. Moreover, it is very affordable.

cards.back: Aunque — Introduce una idea contraria a lo esperado.
cards.example: Although it was raining, we had a great time.

cards.back: Porque — Explica la razón de algo.
cards.example: I couldn't sleep because it was too noisy.

cards.back: A pesar de — Similar a although pero seguido de noun/-ing.
cards.example: Despite the rain, we went to the park.
In addition, we offer free delivery.
The company grew. As a result, they hired more people.

cards.back: Ya que / Puesto que — Causa conocida. Más formal que because.
cards.example: Since you're already here, let's start.

cards.back: Por ejemplo — Introduce un ejemplo concreto.
cards.example: Many fruits are healthy. For instance, oranges have vitamin C.

title: Conectores en Inglés
description: Descifra conectores que organizan ideas en conversaciones profundas.
